Your Instructor

Meet Abdul Manan, PADI OWSI #465559

PADI Open Water Scuba Instructor

OWSI  #465559

I have been diving since 2000. With over 15,000 dives across Indonesia and the Maldives, I do not just guide you — I help you truly understand and fall in love with the ocean. Based in Malé since 2019, I know every current, every cleaning station, and every feeding ground in these waters.

Why Book Directly

The Hammerhead 2 Difference

Talk to Your Instructor Before You Board

No middlemen, no call centres. Contact me directly and I answer personally — in Indonesian, English or German. You know exactly what to expect before arrival.

Small Group — Maximum 12 to 15 Divers

We are not a mass-market operation. Small groups mean more personalised dive planning, uncrowded entry points, and more quality time underwater at the best sites.

Affordable Without Compromise

Maldives liveaboard does not have to cost a fortune. Hammerhead 2 delivers a genuine experience at honest pricing — fully crewed, fully equipped, all meals included.

I Know Every Dive Site Here

Since 2019, I have been diving the Maldives professionally every week. I know the currents, the tides, the cleaning stations and the feeding grounds — your dives are planned by someone who dives them regularly.

PADI Certified — Verifiable and Trusted

My PADI OWSI certification (#465559) is publicly verifiable on the PADI Instructor database. Confirm my credentials before you even contact me. Your safety is always the first priority.

Flexible Itinerary — Your Preferences Matter

Want to dive the same exceptional site twice? Loved a spot and want more time? The itinerary adapts to what the group enjoys — not a rigid schedule set weeks in advance.

Your Home at Sea

Hammerhead 2 — Maldivian Dive Liveaboard

A classic Maldivian Dhoni, purpose-built for dive safaris. Modernised with the comforts you need, without the crowds you do not want.

4 Bunk Cabins Twin bunks
2 Double Cabins Private rooms
Air Conditioning All cabins
Lounge & Kitchen Fresh meals daily
Dive Tanks & Weights Fully equipped
Max 12–15 Guests Small group
Expert Crew Captain & cook
Charter Available From 6 persons

Trusted by Divers Worldwide

Transparent Pricing

Simple, Honest Rates

No hidden fees. No surprises. What you see is what you pay.

Shared Cabin — Bunk Bed
$1,200
per person / 7 nights
  • All meals and snacks on board
  • Up to 4 guided dives per day
  • Tanks and weights included
  • Dive briefings by Abdul
  • Marine life briefings
  • Transfer in Malé

Equipment rental available on board. Marine park fees may apply separately.

  • Tanks and weights included
  • Dive briefings by Abdul

Equipment rental available on board. Marine park fees may apply separately.

Request a Quote
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

A minimum of PADI Open Water — or equivalent SSI, CMAS or NAUI certification — is required for all trips. PADI Advanced Open Water is recommended for deeper channel dives. If you are not yet certified, contact me and I can discuss options.

Message me directly on WhatsApp or email to check availability. A deposit of approximately 30% confirms your slot. Full payment is due four weeks before departure. I will send all details once your dates are confirmed.

Tanks and weights are always included. BCD, regulator, wetsuit and dive computer can be rented aboard for a small fee. Many guests prefer to bring their own mask, fins and wetsuit for personal comfort — this is recommended.

Absolutely — I encourage it. Message me on WhatsApp in Indonesian, English or German. I will answer your questions personally, help you select the right trip, and ensure this safari is the right choice for you.

Yes. Many of our guests travel solo. The small group atmosphere — maximum 12 to 15 divers — is ideal for meeting fellow enthusiasts. I personally ensure solo travellers feel welcome and well looked after throughout the trip.

Cancellations more than 60 days before departure receive a full deposit refund. Between 30 and 60 days: 50% refund. Less than 30 days: no refund. Travel insurance is strongly recommended. We will do our best to transfer your slot to another available date where possible.
